description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum can with a gradient color scheme transitioning from a pale yellow at the top to a deep purple at the bottom. The front of the can features bold, stylized blue and white text reading 'OCEAN POP' with a splash graphic behind it, suggesting a vibrant and refreshing beverage. The can's surface is smooth and metallic, with a glossy finish that reflects light. On the back, there is a detailed ingredients and nutritional information panel printed in white text, along with a barcode and additional branding elements. The top of the can is silver with a typical pull tab opening, indicating it is a sealed, single-use container. The overall design is eye-catching and modern, suitable for display in urban environments such as convenience stores, vending machines, or street-side kiosks.
description: A colorful aluminum can labeled 'OCEAN POP' with a splash graphic, gradient yellow-to-purple background, and detailed nutritional information on the back. The can has a glossy, metallic finish and a standard pull tab opening.
description_view_0: The can is shown with the 'OCEAN POP' logo and splash graphic prominently displayed, with the gradient background clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the back of the can, showing the nutritional information panel and ingredients list in white text.
description_view_2: The can is rotated to show the side with the barcode and additional product information, with the gradient color still visible.
description_view_3: The front of the can is visible again, with the 'OCEAN POP' logo and splash graphic centered, and the pull tab top is also partially visible.
